name: mm_act_fp8_quant_decode
goal: Optimize solution.py against SGLang's sglang_per_token_group_quant_fp8 baseline for MiniMax-M3 per-token FP8 activation quantization decode; beat the full sweep and match both SGLang outputs.

baseline.measure: reference.py timed by the harness CUPTI runtime (median device-kernel us)
